programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
AFLW: West Coast v Gold Coast
programme.desc: West Coast will host Gold Coast in Perth on Thursday night to kick off the 2025 AFLW season under lights.

programme.title: AFLW: West Coast v Gold Coast
programme.desc: West Coast will host Gold Coast in Perth on Thursday night to kick off the 2025 AFLW season under lights.

programme.title: AFLW: Sydney v Richmond
programme.desc: A Friday night showdown between Sydney and last year's finalists Richmond awaits at North Sydney Oval in Round 1 AFLW action.

programme.title: AFLW: Geelong v North Melbourne Tasmania
AFLW: Geelong v North Melbourne Tasmania
programme.desc: A blockbuster opening round battle as Geelong takes on AFLW premiers North Melbourne on home turf at GMHBA Stadium on Saturday.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2004 R11 ESS v HAW
programme.desc: 2004, Round 11. Essendon and the Hawks have hated each other for generations. But the now infamous 'Line in the Sand' game would stoke the fire for years to come. This is unrelenting, unapologetic, unsociable footy.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2004 R11 ESS v HAW
programme.desc: 2004, Round 11. Essendon and the Hawks have hated each other for generations. But the now infamous 'Line in the Sand' game would stoke the fire for years to come. This is unrelenting, unapologetic, unsociable footy.

AFL Thrillers: R19 2012 ADE v ESS
programme.desc: When the Crows hosted the Bombers late in 2012 nether side could have known the magnitude of the game they were about to play. In the final term there were four lead changes and 30 Thrilling Minutes you won't want to miss.

programme.desc: When the Crows hosted the Bombers late in 2012 nether side could have known the magnitude of the game they were about to play. In the final term there were four lead changes and 30 Thrilling Minutes you won't want to miss.

programme.desc: The first ever clash between the GWS Giants and Essendon kicks off Round 1 of the AFLW season in Canberra on Saturday afternoon.

programme.desc: The first ever clash between the GWS Giants and Essendon kicks off Round 1 of the AFLW season in Canberra on Saturday afternoon.

programme.title: AFLW: Western Bulldogs v Melbourne
programme.desc: The Hampson-Hardeman Cup returns to the AFLW as the Western Bulldogs and Melbourne go head-to-head to kick off a new season.

programme.title: Grand Final Classics: 1995 GF GEE v CAR
Grand Final Classics: 1995 GF GEE v CAR
programme.desc: On Fox Footy we take a look back at the VFL/AFL Grand Finals over the last 50 years.

programme.title: Open Mike Top 30: Jason McCartney
programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.title: Open Mike Top 30: Jason McCartney
programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.title: AFL Thrillers: R14 2009 STK v GEE
programme.desc: Arguably the best home-and-away game ever played, the Cats and the Saints were undefeated and both seemingly unstoppable. The final term alone is one every footy fan should watch.

programme.title: AFL Thrillers: R14 2009 STK v GEE
programme.desc: Arguably the best home-and-away game ever played, the Cats and the Saints were undefeated and both seemingly unstoppable. The final term alone is one every footy fan should watch.

programme.title: Game of the Year: 1990 QF COL v WC
programme.desc: AFL has produced many memorable games over it's history, Fox Footy have narrowed it down to the best game of each year.

programme.title: Game of the Year: 1990 QF COL v WC
Incredible Comebacks: 2001 R16 ESS v NM
programme.desc: Is there anything better than when a team looks down and out but then suddenly they flip the script and stage an incredible comeback, here are some of the best.

programme.title: Incredible Comebacks: 2001 R16 ESS v NM
programme.desc: Is there anything better than when a team looks down and out but then suddenly they flip the script and stage an incredible comeback, here are some of the best.

programme.title: Dermie Delivers: Father & Son
programme.desc: What better way to celebrate the feats of the champions of the 80's & 90's, than with some of their best ever games. It's all killer, no filler - Dermie Delivers.

programme.title: Dermie Delivers: Father & Son
programme.desc: What better way to celebrate the feats of the champions of the 80's & 90's, than with some of their best ever games. It's all killer, no filler - Dermie Delivers.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Sydney Drew and his wife see spirits in their home, but when their son is born, the activity changes for the worse. A family move into a house with a whole host of terrifying spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Sydney Drew and his wife see spirits in their home, but when their son is born, the activity changes for the worse. A family move into a house with a whole host of terrifying spirits.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths get cooking when they are tasked with forging a cleaver using only the steel from meat hooks.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: In the battle for winter road supremacy, boss Hugh Roland's plans for VP Express are on the verge of falling apart. Will broken down trucks and ticked off drivers be the straws that break the Polar Bear's back?

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: It's high season. The cod are bigger, the storms are more powerful, the fishing is more dangerous, but the rewards are even greater.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick and his guys get keyed up to restore a colossal 1920s cannonball safe. Can they lock up this protected project or will this massive mission be too heavy to handle?

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick and his guys get keyed up to restore a colossal 1920s cannonball safe. Can they lock up this protected project or will this massive mission be too heavy to handle?

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Judi Love is left bewildered by the prospect of high-fiving Alex Horne, and Bridget Christie has a present for the Taskmaster.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Judi Love is left bewildered by the prospect of high-fiving Alex Horne, and Bridget Christie has a present for the Taskmaster.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Sydney Drew and his wife see spirits in their home, but when their son is born, the activity changes for the worse. A family move into a house with a whole host of terrifying spirits.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess," "Worst Case Scenario," "Redneck Good Times," and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performers.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performers.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's 'prison' hugs all around in the city of Orange. Brandi and Jarrod bring an old friend along to do the heavy lifting, and Ivy finds his fun in the little things.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's 'prison' hugs all around in the city of Orange. Brandi and Jarrod bring an old friend along to do the heavy lifting, and Ivy finds his fun in the little things.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: During a busy Spring Bank Holiday, the Traffic Cops deal with the effects of drink and drugs.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Russell Crusher runs into trouble, taking his new metal muncher to clean up an eyesore at Uluru.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Steph Custance tries to complete her first ice roads mission, but a crossing that's just opened pushes her to the edge. As temperatures soar, Alex Debogorski runs into a road block.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Steph Custance tries to complete her first ice roads mission, but a crossing that's just opened pushes her to the edge. As temperatures soar, Alex Debogorski runs into a road block.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Craig starts bunching without a winch, until a terrifying moment changes his mind. Kylee discovers Badger's 26 km logging road is no less treacherous than Gollen, plus it brings a new obstacle: traffic.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: During a busy Spring Bank Holiday, the Traffic Cops deal with the effects of drink and drugs.

programme.title: Traffic Cops

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Lock and load with the team as Corey and Chumlee check out an 1838 Colt Paterson. Formerly owned by a Civil War colonel, will the guys take a shot at this rare firearm?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Put the pedal to the metal as the guys check out a completely customised 1932 Ford Roaster. With less than 800km on it, will a high asking price put a red light on negotiations?

programme.desc: Put the pedal to the metal as the guys check out a completely customised 1932 Ford Roaster. With less than 800km on it, will a high asking price put a red light on negotiations?

programme.sub-title: We Don't Use The 'S' Word Around Here
programme.desc: Rolling into Buena Park, Brandi & Jarrod pick up what may be the best of the worst. Kenny glides through a locker that's only half decent. Ivy comes to the auction dressed to kill.

programme.title: DMV
programme.sub-title: There Is No I In DMV
programme.desc: Barb takes the team to North Hollywood to learn from their success, but meeting manager Beau shakes her confidence. Gregg and Vic urge Colette to take a bold risk with Noa.

programme.sub-title: There Is No I In DMV

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Set in the dreaded DMV office, following quirky minimum-wage employees who make the best of dealing with annoyed customers, finding solace in each other's company.

programme.title: Krapopolis
programme.desc: An animated comedy set in mythical ancient Greece, centering on a flawed family of humans, gods and monsters as they try to run one of the world's first cities without killing each other.

programme.title: Golf: USPGA Mini: Hero World Challenge
Golf: USPGA Mini: Hero World Challenge
Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: After going out of business, the Ghostbusters reunite to save New York City from a supernatural, slimy doom.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Car fanatic John has filled every inch of outdoor space of his four bedroom home with classic cars. But now he's decided to part with some of his beloved collection to fund his and his wife's retirement.

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Car fanatic John has filled every inch of outdoor space of his four bedroom home with classic cars. But now he's decided to part with some of his beloved collection to fund his and his wife's retirement.

programme.title: Double the Money
programme.desc: In the semi-final, teams have three weeks to turn 4000 GBP into 8000 GBP. One hosts party bus tours, another trades liquidated stock, while others run food festivals and wellness events.

programme.title: Double the Money
programme.desc: In the semi-final, teams have three weeks to turn 4000 GBP into 8000 GBP. One hosts party bus tours, another trades liquidated stock, while others run food festivals and wellness events.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The final potters go head-to-head in the pottery grand final, creating striking chandeliers and faceted bowls. Hosted by Siobhan McSweeney, with Judges Keith Brymer Jones and Rich Miller.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The final potters go head-to-head in the pottery grand final, creating striking chandeliers and faceted bowls. Hosted by Siobhan McSweeney, with Judges Keith Brymer Jones and Rich Miller.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Angela always dreamed of a house by the sea. When she saw a unit at a bargain price, she snapped it up. Now she's desperate to sell, but hasn't had an offer in two years. Can the team turn tiny into terrific?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Cherie and Bryce need to resolve their complicated living situation now their children have left home. There's one problem - their Brisbane Queenslander is in such a state, nobody wants to buy.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Documenting what happens during a 24-hour period in the accident and emergency department at St George's Hospital in south-west London, one of Britain's busiest hospitals.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Documenting what happens during a 24-hour period in the accident and emergency department at St George's Hospital in south-west London, one of Britain's busiest hospitals.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This special features standout unseen items from UK roadshows, including a possible Banksy, a skeleton clock, and an African spear linked to explorer Livingstone.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This special features standout unseen items from UK roadshows, including a possible Banksy, a skeleton clock, and an African spear linked to explorer Livingstone.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: There is not much of an earnings gap between Raj and Irita when they enter the decisive phase in Cornwall. But that does not mean they cannot enjoy some detours.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: There is not much of an earnings gap between Raj and Irita when they enter the decisive phase in Cornwall. But that does not mean they cannot enjoy some detours.

programme.title: Who Will Love My Doggy?
programme.desc: This series has a simple mission - to find loving new homes for dogs whose previous owners can no longer care for them.

programme.title: Who Will Love My Doggy?
programme.desc: This series has a simple mission - to find loving new homes for dogs whose previous owners can no longer care for them.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Michelle & Adrian face an empty nest. She is attached to their ageing seven bedroom home, he wants a fresh start. Neale tries to revive it while Andrew searches for a new place.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Soon to be empty nesters Michelle and Adrian are at a crossroads. Michelle is emotionally tied to their ageing seven-bedroom family home while Adrian's ready to embrace a new chapter. Can Neale breathe new life into a house bursting with memories, or will Andrew convince that happiness might just be waiting in a brand new home?

programme.title: Festive Celebrity Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: James Fleet, Jenny Eclair, Jamie Laing and Sunetra Sarker take to the wheel to make a slab-built illuminated Christmas scene, and see who can throw the most mulled wine tumblers.

programme.title: Festive Celebrity Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: James Fleet, Jenny Eclair, Jamie Laing and Sunetra Sarker take to the wheel to make a slab-built illuminated Christmas scene, and see who can throw the most mulled wine tumblers.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Narelle and her son Shane have been living in their four-bedroom Moreton Bay family home for 35 years. After one failed attempt to sell and move closer to her daughter and grandkids, Narelle needs help.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Cherie and Bryce need to resolve their complicated living situation now their children have left home. There's one problem - their Brisbane Queenslander is in such a state, nobody wants to buy.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a Berkshire couple find a Suffolk home with holiday let potential as their children prepare to fly the nest.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a Berkshire couple find a Suffolk home with holiday let potential as their children prepare to fly the nest.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Cristian Beadman uncovers bronze owls with saucy secrets; Fiona Bruce chats with dancer and Strictly Come Dancing judge Anton Du Beke.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Cristian Beadman uncovers bronze owls with saucy secrets; Fiona Bruce chats with dancer and Strictly Come Dancing judge Anton Du Beke.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp presents from Brackley, Northamptonshire. Charles Hanson has a blast with the blues, and Danny Sebastian helps out the reds.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp presents from Brackley, Northamptonshire. Charles Hanson has a blast with the blues, and Danny Sebastian helps out the reds.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Joh meets an architect specialising in backyard cabins. Adam makes a dinosaur from timber cut-offs. Adam creates a trevalla barbecue recipe. Graham shares his tips for growing dahlias.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Joh meets an architect specialising in backyard cabins. Adam makes a dinosaur from timber cut-offs. Adam creates a trevalla barbecue recipe. Graham shares his tips for growing dahlias.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At the Chateau De La Fare, Janet and Phillip are nearing the end of the rebuild of their two-bedroom suite; the Hutsons are trying to restore an ornate fountain.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At the Chateau De La Fare, Janet and Phillip are nearing the end of the rebuild of their two-bedroom suite; the Hutsons are trying to restore an ornate fountain.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Ellen wants to live in the midst of Margate's vibrant LGBTQ+ community, while Sophie and Matt are hoping to find their perfect Broadstairs abode, but will it be too pricey?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Ellen wants to live in the midst of Margate's vibrant LGBTQ+ community, while Sophie and Matt are hoping to find their perfect Broadstairs abode, but will it be too pricey?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Cherie and Bryce need to resolve their complicated living situation now their children have left home. There's one problem - their Brisbane Queenslander is in such a state, nobody wants to buy.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Cherie and Bryce need to resolve their complicated living situation now their children have left home. There's one problem - their Brisbane Queenslander is in such a state, nobody wants to buy.

programme.title: Nurses On The Ward
programme.desc: Following the nurses of Queen Alexandra Hospital in Portsmouth as they work across multiple areas of the hospital treating both male and female patients from a range of age groups.

programme.title: Nurses On The Ward
programme.desc: Following the nurses of Queen Alexandra Hospital in Portsmouth as they work across multiple areas of the hospital treating both male and female patients from a range of age groups.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Soon to be empty nesters Michelle and Adrian are at a crossroads. Michelle is emotionally tied to their ageing seven-bedroom family home while Adrian's ready to embrace a new chapter. Can Neale breathe new life into a house bursting with memories, or will Andrew convince that happiness might just be waiting in a brand new home?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Soon to be empty nesters Michelle and Adrian are at a crossroads. Michelle is emotionally tied to their ageing seven-bedroom family home while Adrian's ready to embrace a new chapter. Can Neale breathe new life into a house bursting with memories, or will Andrew convince that happiness might just be waiting in a brand new home?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a Berkshire couple find a Suffolk home with holiday let potential as their children prepare to fly the nest.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a Berkshire couple find a Suffolk home with holiday let potential as their children prepare to fly the nest.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Documenting what happens during a 24-hour period in the accident and emergency department at St George's Hospital in south-west London, one of Britain's busiest hospitals.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Documenting what happens during a 24-hour period in the accident and emergency department at St George's Hospital in south-west London, one of Britain's busiest hospitals.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: The true story of Captain Richard Phillips and the 2009 hijacking by Somali pirates of the US-flagged MV Maersk Alabama, the first American cargo ship to be hijacked in two hundred years.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: A financial TV host and his producer are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything forcefully takes over their studio.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: As a police psychologist works to talk down an ex-con who is threatening to jump from a Manhattan hotel rooftop, the biggest diamond heist ever committed is in motion.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: As a police psychologist works to talk down an ex-con who is threatening to jump from a Manhattan hotel rooftop, the biggest diamond heist ever committed is in motion.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Night Passage
programme.desc: A former Los Angeles lawman becomes the new police chief of a small fishing town that holds dirty secrets.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Night Passage
programme.desc: A former Los Angeles lawman becomes the new police chief of a small fishing town that holds dirty secrets.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A bedridden detective teams up with a sharp rookie to catch a sadistic killer who leaves bizarre clues behind. As they close in they become his next targets.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A bedridden detective teams up with a sharp rookie to catch a sadistic killer who leaves bizarre clues behind. As they close in they become his next targets.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Based on a terrifyingly true and tragic story, a fishing crew sail into a disastrous storm when three hurricanes merge, creating mountainous waves.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Based on a terrifyingly true and tragic story, a fishing crew sail into a disastrous storm when three hurricanes merge, creating mountainous waves.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Death On Duty
Hailey Dean Mysteries: Death On Duty
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor helps a detective investigate the murder of a former Marine.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: A group of European mercenaries become embroiled in the defense of the Great Wall of China in this epic adventure.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment, Ethan chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the wrong hands. The IMF team must stop the fallout.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike, Kristin and the team investigate the murder of a farmers' market owner who staggers into the crowd with a garden implement fatally embedded in her back.

programme.title: The Anarchists
programme.desc: A shocking murder makes international headlines and leaves the community wondering if the perpetrator is one of their own.

programme.title: The Turncoat
programme.desc: Acclaimed World War II drama about a young German soldier torn between a sense of duty, guilt and conscience, who ultimately defects to fight with the Red Army.

programme.title: Imma Tataranni: Deputy Prosecutor
programme.desc: While swimming in Metaponto on vacation, Imma finds a female finger floating in the sea.

programme.title: Imma Tataranni: Deputy Prosecutor
programme.desc: While swimming in Metaponto on vacation, Imma finds a female finger floating in the sea.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Were The Dixie Chicks cancelled? Is Insane Clown Posse a Gang? The Legend of the Rickroll.

programme.title: Secrets of the Hells Angels
programme.desc: The Hells Angels run a massive meth operation. Undercover informant Tony Tait poses as a dealer to infiltrate the gang.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.sub-title: To Die Or Not To Die
programme.desc: When a member of The Brokenwood Theatre Society dies, the initial belief is that it was from natural causes. However, Mike detects there is "something rotten in the state of Brokenwood".

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.sub-title: To Die Or Not To Die
programme.desc: When a member of The Brokenwood Theatre Society dies, the initial belief is that it was from natural causes. However, Mike detects there is "something rotten in the state of Brokenwood".

programme.title: Justified
programme.desc: Enforcing his own brand of justice, US Marshal Raylan, a strong-willed, quiet law-man haunted by his past, returns to his native town to see that justice is served to those in need.

programme.title: Justified
programme.desc: Enforcing his own brand of justice, US Marshal Raylan, a strong-willed, quiet law-man haunted by his past, returns to his native town to see that justice is served to those in need.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.sub-title: To Die Or Not To Die
programme.desc: When a member of The Brokenwood Theatre Society dies, the initial belief is that it was from natural causes. However, Mike detects there is "something rotten in the state of Brokenwood".

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.sub-title: To Die Or Not To Die
programme.desc: When a member of The Brokenwood Theatre Society dies, the initial belief is that it was from natural causes. However, Mike detects there is "something rotten in the state of Brokenwood".

programme.title: The Shield
programme.desc: A group of cops bend the rules to boost results. Their captain disapproves, until he sees how their actions can serve his own political agenda.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: When Nandor and Laszlo are abducted by a coven of witches, the others must venture to Brooklyn to rescue them.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: As they prepare to attend an exclusive event on the vampire social calendar, the vampires try to survive without Guillermo.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: As they prepare to attend an exclusive event on the vampire social calendar, the vampires try to survive without Guillermo.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.sub-title: To Die Or Not To Die
programme.desc: When a member of The Brokenwood Theatre Society dies, the initial belief is that it was from natural causes. However, Mike detects there is "something rotten in the state of Brokenwood".

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.sub-title: To Die Or Not To Die

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: The Jackal visits a specialist armorer with a special commission for his next job but with Bianca also tracking Norman down, she is starting to close in on the Jackal.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: The Jackal visits a specialist armorer with a special commission for his next job but with Bianca also tracking Norman down, she is starting to close in on the Jackal.

programme.title: The Shield
programme.desc: A group of cops bend the rules to boost results. Their captain disapproves, until he sees how their actions can serve his own political agenda.

programme.title: The Shield
programme.desc: A group of cops bend the rules to boost results. Their captain disapproves, until he sees how their actions can serve his own political agenda.

programme.title: Justified
programme.desc: Enforcing his own brand of justice, US Marshal Raylan, a strong-willed, quiet law-man haunted by his past, returns to his native town to see that justice is served to those in need.

programme.title: Catch and Release
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, a young woman whose fiance suddenly dies finds comfort with his caring friends, but catches herself falling for the irresponsible playboy of the group.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
Turbo
programme.desc: A high velocity comedy about an underdog snail who kicks into overdrive when he miraculously attains the power of super-speed. But after making fast friends with a crew of streetwise, tricked-out es-car-goes, Turbo learns that no one succeeds on their own. So he puts his heart and shell on the line to help his pals achieve their dreams, before Turbo-charging his own impossible dream: winning the Indy 500.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit, the mischievous and adventurous hero who has captivated generations of readers, now takes on the starring role of his own cute, contemporary comedy with attitude. In the film, Peter's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: A young boy searches for the one thing that will enable him to win the affection of the girl of his dreams. He must discover the story of the Lorax, the creature who fights to protect his world.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When Oh, a loveable misfit from another planet, lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own people, he forms an unlikely friendship with an adventurous girl named Tip who is on a quest of her own. Through a series of comic adventures with Tip, Oh comes to understand that being different and making mistakes is all part of being human. And while he changes her planet and she changes his world, they discover the true meaning of the word home.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Travel back to the stone-age in this big-budget treatment of the world's favourite prehistoric family! Fred Flintstone, a put-upon blue-collar worker struggling to squeak by, with the help of his best buddy Barney and his wife Wilma. After an aptitude test mix up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Slate & Company Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. But there's trouble brewing in Bedrock: An evil executive and his sinister secretary are now plotting to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme!

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: In this hilarious animated adventure comedy, you'll finally find out why the birds are so angry. In an island paradise populated entirely by happy, flightless birds - or almost entirely, Red, a bird with a temper problem, speedy Chuck, and the volatile Bomb have always been outsiders. But when the island is visited by mysterious green piggies, it's up to these unlikely outcasts to figure out what the pigs are up to.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
programme.desc: Our friendly neighbourhood Super Hero decides to join his best friends Ned, MJ, and the rest of the gang on a European vacation. However, Peter's plan to leave super heroics behind for a few weeks are quickly scrapped when he begrudgingly agrees to help Nick Fury uncover the mystery of several elemental creature attacks, creating havoc across the continent!

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee appears at the door of a stressed young mother, who is trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war. But once she's arrived, Nanny McPhee discovers that the children are fighting a war of their own against two spoiled city cousins who have just moved in and refuse to leave.

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Megamind is the most brilliant super-villain the world has ever known - and the least successful. But when Metro City is threatened by a new villain, can the world's biggest 'mind' actually save the day?

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: When a Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home, he finds himself lost and alone at Paddington Station. This charming family comedy is based on the classic children's books.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Buster Moon is a dapper koala who presides over a once grand theatre that has fallen on hard times. Buster is an eternal optimist, and maybe a bit of a scoundrel, who loves his theatre above all and will do anything to preserve it. Now facing the crumbling of his life's ambition, he has one final chance to restore his fading jewel to its former glory by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything
programme.desc: Those vege-eating boys are back! This time they're cabin boys in a pirate theatre and are called upon to put aside their lazy, cowardly ways and help a princess rescue her brother who's been kidnapped.

programme.title: Funny Birds
programme.desc: College student Charlie returns to her family farm to help her mother. Their lives differ, and when Charlie's French grandmother arrives, old wounds resurface.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: Based on a true story, veteran deep-sea divers brave brutal ocean conditions to save a trapped crew-mate stranded hundreds of feet beneath the surface.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: Based on a true story, veteran deep-sea divers brave brutal ocean conditions to save a trapped crew-mate stranded hundreds of feet beneath the surface.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: The most frightened guy on Earth leads a motley crew of survivors in a world overrun by zombies.

programme.title: Night School
programme.desc: A man must attend night school classes alongside a group of oddballs in order to earn his much needed diploma.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five best friends from college reunite 10 years later for a wild bachelorette weekend in Miami. Their partying takes a dark turn when they accidentally kill a male stripper.

programme.title: Starsky & Hutch
programme.desc: Join uptight David Starsky and laid-back Ken 'Hutch' Hutchinson as they're paired for the first time as undercover cops and are forced overcome their differences to solve an important case.
